_comment: Currency item descriptions and effects, sourced from Path of Exile 2's own game data (as bundled by poe.ninja's frontend). Copied here as a static file rather than fetched live, since poe.ninja's internal asset URLs are unstable across their deploys and this content rarely changes. Keyed by item name to match this app's existing Item.name field.

Ancient Infuser.descrText: Right click this item then left click on a Tablet to apply it.
explicitMods: Modifies a Tablet unpredictably and Corrupts it

Arcanist's Etcher.descrText: Right click this item then left click a wand, staff or sceptre to apply it.
explicitMods: Improves the quality of a wand, staff or sceptre

Architect's Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click on a corrupted item to apply it.
explicitMods: Modifies a Corrupted Equipment or Jewel item unpredictably or destroys it

Armourer's Scrap.descrText: Right click this item then left click an armour to apply it.
explicitMods: Improves the quality of an armour

Artificer's Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click a Martial Weapon, wand, staff or Armour to apply it.
explicitMods: Adds an Augment Socket to a Martial Weapon, wand, staff or Armour

Artificer's Shard.descrText: A stack of 10 shards becomes an Artificer's Orb.

Blacksmith's Whetstone.descrText: Right click this item then left click a martial weapon to apply it.
explicitMods: Improves the quality of a martial weapon

Chance Shard.descrText: A stack of 10 shards becomes an Orb of Chance.

Chaos Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click a rare item to apply it.
explicitMods: Removes a random modifier and augments a Rare item with a new random modifier

Core Destabiliser.descrText: Right click this item then left click on a soul core to apply it.
explicitMods: Modifies a Soul Core unpredictably, with a chance to destroy it

Cryptic Key.descrText: Right click this item then left click a Strongbox to open it. May only be used once per Strongbox.
explicitMods: Opens an unopened Strongbox allowing it to be opened an additional time

Crystallised Corruption.descrText: Right click this item then left click on a corrupted gem to apply it.
explicitMods: Modifies a Corrupted Skill Gem unpredictably or destroys it

Divine Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click an item to apply it.
explicitMods: Randomises the numeric values of modifiers on an item

Exalted Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click a rare item to apply it. Rare items can have up to six random modifiers.
explicitMods: Augments a Rare item with a new random modifier

Fracturing Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click a rare item to apply it. Cannot be used on Fractured items.
explicitMods: Fracture a random modifier on a rare item with at least 4 modifiers, locking it in place.

Gemcutter's Prism.descrText: Right click this item then left click a skill gem to apply it.
explicitMods: Improves the quality of a Skill Gem

Glassblower's Bauble.descrText: Right click this item then left click a flask to apply it.
explicitMods: Improves the quality of a flask

Greater Chaos Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click a rare item to apply it.
explicitMods: Removes a random modifier and augments a Rare item with a new random modifier

Greater Exalted Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click a rare item to apply it. Rare items can have up to six random modifiers.
explicitMods: Augments a Rare item with a new random modifier

Greater Jeweller's Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click a Skill Gem to apply it. Can only apply to Skill Gems with fewer than 4 Support Gem Sockets.
explicitMods: Sets a Skill Gem to have 4 Support Gem Sockets

Greater Orb of Augmentation.descrText: Right click this item then left click a magic item to apply it. Magic items can have up to two random modifiers.
explicitMods: Augments a Magic item with a new random modifier

Greater Orb of Transmutation.descrText: Right click this item then left click a normal item to apply it.
explicitMods: Upgrades a Normal item to a Magic item with 1 modifier

Greater Regal Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click a magic item to apply it. Current modifiers are retained and a new one is added.
explicitMods: Upgrades a Magic item to a Rare item, adding 1 modifier

Hinekora's Lock.descrText: Right click this item then left click an item to apply it.
explicitMods: Allows an item to foresee the result of the next Currency item used on it. Modifying the item in any way removes the ability to foresee

Lesser Jeweller's Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click a Skill Gem to apply it. Can only apply to Skill Gems with fewer than 3 Support Gem Sockets.
explicitMods: Sets a Skill Gem to have 3 Support Gem Sockets

Mirror of Kalandra.descrText: Right click this item then left click an equipable non-unique item to apply it. Mirrored copies cannot be modified.
explicitMods: Creates a Mirrored copy of an item

Orb of Alchemy.descrText: Right click this item then left click a normal or magic item to apply it. Current modifiers are not retained.
explicitMods: Upgrades a Normal or Magic item to a Rare item with 4 random modifiers

Orb of Annulment.descrText: Right click this item then left click on a magic or rare item to apply it.
explicitMods: Removes a random modifier from an item

Orb of Augmentation.descrText: Right click this item then left click a magic item to apply it. Magic items can have up to two random modifiers.
explicitMods: Augments a Magic item with a new random modifier

Orb of Chance.descrText: Right click this item then left click a normal item to apply it.
explicitMods: Unpredictably either upgrades a Normal item to Unique rarity or destroys it

Orb of Extraction.descrText: Right click this item then left click on an item containing socketed Augments to apply it.
explicitMods: Destroys an Equipment item, returning any non Socket-Bound Augments socketed in it

Orb of Transmutation.descrText: Right click this item then left click a normal item to apply it.
explicitMods: Upgrades a Normal item to a Magic item with 1 modifier

Perfect Chaos Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click a rare item to apply it.
explicitMods: Removes a random modifier and augments a Rare item with a new random modifier

Perfect Exalted Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click a rare item to apply it. Rare items can have up to six random modifiers.
explicitMods: Augments a Rare item with a new random modifier

Perfect Jeweller's Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click a Skill Gem to apply it. Can only apply to Skill Gems with fewer than 5 Support Gem Sockets.
explicitMods: Sets a Skill Gem to have 5 Support Gem Sockets

Perfect Orb of Augmentation.descrText: Right click this item then left click a magic item to apply it. Magic items can have up to two random modifiers.
explicitMods: Augments a Magic item with a new random modifier

Perfect Orb of Transmutation.descrText: Right click this item then left click a normal item to apply it.
explicitMods: Upgrades a Normal item to a Magic item with 1 modifier

Perfect Regal Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click a magic item to apply it. Current modifiers are retained and a new one is added.
explicitMods: Upgrades a Magic item to a Rare item, adding 1 modifier

Regal Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click a magic item to apply it. Current modifiers are retained and a new one is added.
explicitMods: Upgrades a Magic item to a Rare item, adding 1 modifier

Regal Shard.descrText: A stack of 10 shards becomes a Regal Orb.

Scroll of Wisdom.descrText: Right click this item then left click an unidentified item to apply it.
explicitMods: Identifies an item

Transmutation Shard.descrText: A stack of 10 shards becomes an Orb of Transmutation

Vaal Arcanist's Infuser.descrText: Right click this item then left click a wand, staff or sceptre to apply it. Can only be used on items at or above maximum quality.
explicitMods: Improves the quality of a wand, staff or sceptre, exceeding maximum quality by up to 10% with a chance of Corrupting it

Vaal Armourer's Infuser.descrText: Right click this item then left click an armour to apply it. Can only be used on items at or above maximum quality.
explicitMods: Improves the quality of an Armour, exceeding maximum quality by up to 10% with a chance of Corrupting it

Vaal Blacksmith's Infuser.descrText: Right click this item then left click a martial weapon to apply it. Can only be used on items at or above maximum quality.
explicitMods: Improves the quality of a Martial Weapon, exceeding maximum quality by up to 10% with a chance of Corrupting it

Vaal Catalysing Infuser.descrText: Right click this item then left click a ring or amulet to apply it. Can only be used on items at or above maximum quality.
explicitMods: Improves the quality of a ring or amulet, exceeding maximum quality by up to 10% with a chance of Corrupting it

Vaal Cultivation Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click on a unique item to apply it.
explicitMods: Replaces up to 2 modifiers on a Corrupted Vaal Unique. Replaces other Uniques with a Corrupted Unique of the same Item Class

Vaal Orb.descrText: Right click this item then left click an item to corrupt it. Corrupted items cannot be modified again.
explicitMods: Modifies an item unpredictably and Corrupts it

Vaal Siphoner.descrText: Right click this item then left click on a corrupted rare jewellery item to apply it.
explicitMods: Adds a kill threshold to a Corrupted Rare Jewellery item, when threshold is met Siphons a random modifier and improves the numeric values of other modifiers
